title: Top 20 tennis stars including Djokovic and Sabalenka protest French Open prize money as boycott talk grows
summary_full: Tensions between top tennis players and the Grand Slams are escalating ahead of the 2026 French Open, with Aryna Sabalenka warning of a potential boycott over prize money and player welfare. Despite a 9.5% increase at Roland Garros, players argue their revenue share continues to decline, citing inadequate consultation, insufficient welfare provisions, and a growing disconnect between tournament earnings and competitor compensation.
